message:
🌱 Add perses: Panels should have the option to see the queries being mission (#975)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "perses-3071-panels-should-have-the-option-to-see-the-queries-being-executed-from",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "perses: Panels should have the option to see the queries being executed from the UI",
+    "description": "Panels should have the option to see the queries being executed from the UI. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current Perses version",
+        "description": "Verify your Perses installation supports the query inspection feature. This was introduced in the version associated with PR #3204.\n```bash\n# If running via Docker\ndocker exec perses perses --version\n\n# If running on Kubernetes\nkubectl get pods -n perses -o jsonpath='{.items[0].spec.containers[0].image}'\n```\nUpgrade if you are running an older version."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade Perses to a version with query inspection",
+        "description": "Upgrade your Perses deployment to include the panel query inspection feature:\n```bash\n# If running via Docker\ndocker pull persesdev/perses:latest\ndocker stop perses && docker rm perses\ndocker run -d --name perses -p 8080:8080 -v perses-data:/etc/perses persesdev/perses:latest\n\n# If running on Kubernetes via Helm\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade perses perses/perses -n perses\n```\nThis feature allows users to see the queries being executed by a panel without entering edit mode, making it easier to troubleshoot panels that show no data."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Use the query inspection feature",
+        "description": "Once upgraded, navigate to any dashboard panel in the Perses UI:\n1. Hover over a panel to reveal the panel menu\n2. Click the query inspection option to view the queries being executed\n3. Review the query syntax and data source configuration\n4. If the query is incorrect, click to enter edit mode and fix it\n\nThis is especially useful for troubleshooting panels that display no data or unexpected results."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Confirm the query inspection feature is available on your dashboards:\n1. Open the Perses UI and navigate to an existing dashboard\n2. Check that each panel offers a query inspection option in its menu\n3. Verify the displayed queries match the expected PromQL or other query language expressions\n\nIf running on Kubernetes, check that the upgrade completed successfully:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n perses\nkubectl rollout status deployment perses -n perses\n```"
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Added a query inspection option to dashboard panels, allowing users to view the queries being executed without entering edit mode. This helps troubleshoot panels showing no data by revealing the underlying query syntax and data source configuration.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "perses",
+      "sandbox",
+      "observability",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "perses"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "sandbox",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/perses/perses/issues/3071",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/perses/perses",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/perses/perses/pull/3204"
+    },
+    "reactions": 3,
+    "comments": 10,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "docker",
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Perses instance (via Docker or Kubernetes) with at least one dashboard configured with panels and data sources."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-13T06:45:13.125Z",
